query_title: The Boy, the Mole, the Fox and the Horse

recommendations.title: Dragon Rider
recommendations.overview: An unlikely trio of heroes – a dragon, a boy and a forest brownie – embark on an epic adventure to find the “Rim of Heaven” - the mythological safe haven for all dragons.

recommendations.title: Once Upon a Forest
recommendations.overview: A young mouse, mole and hedgehog risk their lives to find a cure for their badger friend, who's been poisoned by men.

recommendations.title: Klaus
recommendations.overview: A selfish postman and a reclusive toymaker form an unlikely friendship, delivering joy to a cold, dark town that desperately needs it.

recommendations.title: Dinosaur
recommendations.overview: An orphaned dinosaur raised by lemurs joins an arduous trek to a sancturary after a meteorite shower destroys his family home.

recommendations.title: Main Krishna Hoon
recommendations.overview: In answer to an orphan boy's prayers, the divine Lord Krishna comes to Earth, befriends the boy, and helps him find a loving family.

recommendations.title: Kitbull
recommendations.overview: An unlikely connection sparks between two creatures: a fiercely independent stray kitten and a pit bull. Together, they experience friendship for the first time.

recommendations.title: All Dogs Go to Heaven 2
recommendations.overview: Charlie and Itchy return to Earth to find Gabriel's Horn, but along the way meet up with a young boy named David, who ran away from home.

recommendations.title: Fantastic Mr. Fox
recommendations.overview: The Fantastic Mr. Fox, bored with his current life, plans a heist against the three local farmers. The farmers, tired of sharing their chickens with the sly fox, seek revenge against him and his family.

recommendations.title: Interstate 60
recommendations.overview: An aspiring painter meets various characters and learns valuable lessons while traveling across America.

recommendations.title: In a Heartbeat
recommendations.overview: A closeted boy runs the risk of being outed by his own heart after it pops out of his chest to chase down the boy of his dreams.
